# openwrt-docs4ai - LLM Routing Index
> For a flat file listing, see [llms-full.txt](./llms-full.txt)

> **Version:** openwrt/openwrt@1f30a32, openwrt/luci@e08008c, jow-/ucode@591d1f6
> **Total Context Available:** ~426092 tokens

## Core Daemons
- [openwrt-hotplug](./openwrt-hotplug/llms.txt): Documents the standard hotplug event environment variables injected by OpenWrt's netifd and network subsystems into scripts in /etc/hotplug.d/. (~1412 tokens)
- [procd](./procd/llms.txt): Defines the procd init script Bash API for service registration and supervised process lifecycle control. (~352 tokens)
- [uci](./uci/llms.txt): Defines the default UCI configuration schema for the OpenWrt qos-scripts traffic-shaping system. (~420 tokens)

## Scripting & Logic
- [luci](./luci/llms.txt): Implements the CBI declarative form framework for LuCI. (~19723 tokens)
- [ucode](./ucode/llms.txt): Provides runtime introspection and tracing utilities for ucode scripts. (~79937 tokens)

## Ecosystem
- [luci-examples](./luci-examples/llms.txt): commands.js (~100272 tokens)
- [openwrt-core](./openwrt-core/llms.txt): OpenWrt Buildroot: boot packages > **Source:** https://github.com/openwrt/openwrt/tree/master/package/boot --- apex Field Value --- --- Version 1.6.10-openwrt License GPL-2.0 Source URL https://github.com/linusw/apex.git > Source: https:... (~23140 tokens)

## Manuals
- [wiki](./wiki/llms.txt): 21.02: Major cosmetic changes This page intends to give an overview over major cosmetic changes since 19.07, focusing on those that will require adjustments/adaption downstream. (~200836 tokens)

## Complete Aggregation
If your context window permits, you may fetch the flat URL index:
- [llms-full.txt](./llms-full.txt): Exhaustive flat catalog of generated AI-facing documents. (~0 tokens)
